evidence: User could not find the project settings page after signup. Spent 12 minutes before submitting ticket. Quoted: 'I had no idea where to start.'
Detractor score of 4. Comment: 'The export feature is missing the columns I actually need. I end up rebuilding reports in Excel every week.'
Prospect asked three separate times what is included in the Pro tier versus the Team tier. Confusion about seat limits.
Multiple users requested a way to batch or mute notifications. One user said: 'I have turned off all emails because there are too many.'
Power user with 400+ projects reported that search returns irrelevant results when project names are similar. Has resorted to manual scrolling.
